'''Seeker missiles''' were guided projectiles that were designed to track a target's heat signature. Each individual rocket was relatively slow while in flight and it was filled with enough [[Detonite/Legends|detonite]] to overwhelm the strongest personal shielding. The [[Phase III Dark Trooper]] was armed with seeker missiles, and was capable of firing a "seemingly endless" supply of projectiles.<ref name="EGTD" /> Seeker missiles could be fired from [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]]; [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar's]] weapon was modified in such a manner.<ref name="SotEVG">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (video game)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' video game]]</ref>
